evals.prompt: 帮我跑一下 startup tracker，看看上周 Virtue AI 和 Nexus AI 有什么新动态
evals.expected_output: Agent runs tracker and provides a conversational summary of findings for monitored companies

evals.prompt: 我最近发现了一家叫 'Anthropic' 的 AI 安全公司，想帮我把他们加到 startup tracker 的监控列表里。他们的官网是 https://www.anthropic.com
evals.expected_output: Agent adds Anthropic to config.json while preserving existing entries, without errors for missing social links

evals.prompt: startup tracker 的监控周期现在是多久？改成 7 天，我想每周自动跑一次
evals.expected_output: Agent shows current interval (14 days), updates to 7, explains that auto-scheduling requires external setup
